__doc__: Phase 5 §5.1 source of truth: Uranium (tileset_id, tile_id) -> pokeemerald metatile. See PATHFINDER_STEP2_TILE_MAP_PLAN.md + src/rpg2gba/tileset_converter/tile_map.py. RMXP tile_id: 0=empty; 48..383=autotiles (base=48*n); >=384 static. GBA metatile_id: 0x000..0x1FF primary, 0x200+ secondary. PATHFINDER v1 = PURE PASSABILITY BUCKETS (user decision 2026-06-15): 'tiles' is empty; every tile resolves via 'buckets' keyed on its source passages (passable vs blocked) from output/uranium-build/tilesets.json. 'buckets[ts]' = {passable, blocked, void} metatile ids harvested from vanilla maps (scripts/harvest_bucket_metatiles.py). collision is set per-cell from passages by the layout converter, not stored here; elevation policy = passable 3 / blocked 0 / void 0. Hand-mapping high-frequency tiles into 'tiles' (each overrides its bucket) is the later fidelity pass. 'stacks' (Q1 composite z0,z1,z2 override) is unused in v1.
